title: The Iron Giant Moves Again
description: On pages 5–7, this part focuses on York, Unknown person #4, Kizaru, Lilith, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as The Straw Hats, Bonney, giants, Vegapunk satellites, and the Iron Giant struggle to escape while the Five Elders press the island from every direction.
scene: The Straw Hats, Bonney, giants, Vegapunk satellites, and the Iron Giant struggle to escape while the Five Elders press the island from every direction.

dialogue.speaker: Kizaru
dialogue.text: How many of you vegapunks survived?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I just checked who's still interacting with punk records!!!

dialogue.speaker: Lilith
dialogue.text: Lilith is still up on this stratum!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And Atlas is down at the Northeast coast!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Punk records appears to have been programmed to function and grow even after the Vegapunk's termination.

dialogue.speaker: York
dialogue.text: We can benefit from it through york...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The other two 'geniuses' are nothing but loose ends!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Of course!! Gaba BABA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Woah!! So this is a giant's ship?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Where's usopp?! Isn't he here?! What about Chopper?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Damn it all!! Chase them down!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no way we can let them escape when we have this many battleships!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Giants are too tough!! Are you two gonna be okay?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's so frustrating to be rendered helpless like this. Her ability is incredible!!

summary: This part advances the Escape from Egghead through 35 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
